channel.title: admin on SBMARUF
channel.description: Recent content in admin on SBMARUF

item.description: M Saiful Bari (Maruf) is a researcher at Amazon AGI, currently studying ablations and scaling laws for Nova Series Models. Previously, he worked on enhancing multilingual capabilities. Earlier before joining Amazon, he was the Training Lead and one of the Core Maintainers of ALLaM, a sovereign foundational model for English and Arabic language technologies. His research focuses on understanding and advancing large language models, particularly in the areas of scaling, training dynamics, and systematic evaluation of frontier (-> superintelligence) models.
